'''√zh-dh-n''' ('''kazhadhan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debilitate|debilitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debilitate|debilitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √zh-dh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazhadhan
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizhadhan || jizhadhan || shizhadhan || kizhadhan
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzhadhan || jujuzhadhan || shushuzhadhan || kukuzhadhan
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzhadhan || juzhadhan || shuzhadhan || kuzhadhan
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzhadhan || juzhadhan || shuzhadhan || kuzhadhan
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezhadhan || jezhadhan || shezhadhan || kezhadhan
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozhadhan || jojozhadhan || shoshozhadhan || kokozhadhan
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozhadhan || jozhadhan || shozhadhan || kozhadhan
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozhadhan || jozhadhan || shozhadhan || kozhadhan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan || zhadhan
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzhadhan || jæzhadhan || shæzhadhan || kæzhadhan
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazhadhan || jajazhadhan || shashazhadhan || kakazhadhan
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazhadhan || jazhadhan || shazhadhan || kazhadhan
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazhadhan || jazhadhan || shazhadhan || kazhadhan
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazhadhan
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazhadhan
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazhadhan
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazhadhannü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazhadhannknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazhadhannü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazhadhanshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazhadhannkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazhadhanshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazhadhanro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazhadhannkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazhadhanro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazhadhanmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazhadhannkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazhadhanmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazhadhansher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazhadhannksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazhadhansher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazhadhanng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazhadhannkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazhadhanng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazhadhanya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazhadhannkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazhadhanya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazhadhanyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazhadhannkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazhadhanyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazhadhannüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazhadhannknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazhadhannüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhadhannüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhadhannknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhadhannüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazhadhannümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhadhannknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhadhannümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazhadhanshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazhadhannkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazhadhanshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhadhanshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhadhannkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhadhanshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazhadhanshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhadhannkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhadhanshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazhadhanronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazhadhannkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazhadhanronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazhadhanroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazhadhannkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazhadhanroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazhadhanromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhadhannkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhadhanromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazhadhanmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazhadhannkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazhadhanmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazhadhanmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazhadhannkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazhadhanmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhadhanmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhadhannkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhadhanmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
